mapper.sql: ID, Model, TypeId, splitMethod, splitModelNo, decideResult, defaultSplitMethod, splitQuantity, describe, Classify, CreatedUser, CreatedTime, UpdatedUser, UpdatedTime, status
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from dbo.ops_result
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into dbo.ops_result (ID, Model, TypeId, splitMethod, splitModelNo, decideResult, defaultSplitMethod, splitQuantity, describe, Classify, CreatedUser, CreatedTime, UpdatedUser, UpdatedTime, status ) values (#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{model,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{typeid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{splitmethod,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{splitmodelno,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{decideresult,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{defaultsplitmethod,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{splitquantity,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{describe,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{classify,jdbcType=BIT}, #{createduser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createdtime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateduser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updatedtime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR} )

mapper.update:
update dbo.ops_result
ID = #{record.id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
Model = #{record.model,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
TypeId = #{record.typeid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
splitMethod = #{record.splitmethod,jdbcType=CHAR},
splitModelNo = #{record.splitmodelno,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
decideResult = #{record.decideresult,jdbcType=CHAR},
defaultSplitMethod = #{record.defaultsplitmethod,jdbcType=CHAR},
splitQuantity = #{record.splitquantity,jdbcType=INTEGER},
describe = #{record.describe,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
Classify = #{record.classify,jdbcType=BIT},
CreatedUser = #{record.createduser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
CreatedTime = #{record.createdtime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
UpdatedUser = #{record.updateduser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
UpdatedTime = #{record.updatedtime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
status = #{record.status,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

update dbo.ops_result set ID = #{record.id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, Model = #{record.model,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TypeId = #{record.typeid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, splitMethod = #{record.splitmethod,jdbcType=CHAR}, splitModelNo = #{record.splitmodelno,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, decideResult = #{record.decideresult,jdbcType=CHAR}, defaultSplitMethod = #{record.defaultsplitmethod,jdbcType=CHAR}, splitQuantity = #{record.splitquantity,jdbcType=INTEGER}, describe = #{record.describe,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, Classify = #{record.classify,jdbcType=BIT}, CreatedUser = #{record.createduser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CreatedTime = #{record.createdtime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, UpdatedUser = #{record.updateduser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UpdatedTime = #{record.updatedtime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, status = #{record.status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

update dbo.ops_result
Model = #{model,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
TypeId = #{typeid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
splitMethod = #{splitmethod,jdbcType=CHAR},
splitModelNo = #{splitmodelno,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
decideResult = #{decideresult,jdbcType=CHAR},
defaultSplitMethod = #{defaultsplitmethod,jdbcType=CHAR},
splitQuantity = #{splitquantity,jdbcType=INTEGER},
describe = #{describe,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
Classify = #{classify,jdbcType=BIT},
CreatedUser = #{createduser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
CreatedTime = #{createdtime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
UpdatedUser = #{updateduser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
UpdatedTime = #{updatedtime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
status = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where ID = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update dbo.ops_result set Model = #{model,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TypeId = #{typeid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, splitMethod = #{splitmethod,jdbcType=CHAR}, splitModelNo = #{splitmodelno,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, decideResult = #{decideresult,jdbcType=CHAR}, defaultSplitMethod = #{defaultsplitmethod,jdbcType=CHAR}, splitQuantity = #{splitquantity,jdbcType=INTEGER}, describe = #{describe,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, Classify = #{classify,jdbcType=BIT}, CreatedUser = #{createduser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CreatedTime = #{createdtime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, UpdatedUser = #{updateduser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UpdatedTime = #{updatedtime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, status = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where ID = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
